leads.profitability_check: Suzuki Integrated Report 2025 (verified PDF): FY2024 (ended Mar-2025) consolidated revenue JPY 5,825.2bn, operating profit JPY 642.9bn, operating margin 11.0%, shareholders' equity JPY 2,970.7bn, issuer rating A+

evidence: "Growth investment will primarily focus on increasing production capacity to meet growing demand in India and developing technology to minimize energy consumption." (Integrated Report 2025)

"Specifically, we plan to invest a total of 4 trillion yen in growth by FY2030, including 2 trillion yen in capital investment, of which 1.2 trillion yen is related to India" (Integrated Report 2025 — capex table explicitly shows 'India portion of total: 1,200' of 2,000 billion yen)
India = 42.0% of consolidated revenue and 55.4% of automobile unit sales by region; India passenger car share (FY2024) 40.6%, ranked 1st (Integrated Report 2025, 'Suzuki at a Glance')

"Over 40 years ago, Suzuki entered the Indian market... For more than four decades, we have closely tied manufacturing and sales together in the Indian market. This is a major strength of Suzuki" (Integrated Report 2025, 'India Strategy')

Report also details a biogas business in India with the National Dairy Development Board (NDDB) tied to CNG vehicles (Suzuki holds ~70% of India's CNG vehicle market per report) and carbon-neutrality work at the Gujarat plant
External corroboration: Maruti Suzuki's Kharkhoda (Haryana) mega plant opened 2025, ~Rs 35,000 crore program targeting 1M units (Deccan Herald/Zee Business, Jun-2025 news)
india_apac_interest.india_operations: Maruti Suzuki India (listed subsidiary, ~40.6% PV share), Suzuki Motor Gujarat plant, new Kharkhoda Haryana plant (2025), R&D and biogas JV with NDDB

method_notes: Candidate pool /private/tmp/.../scratchpad/candidates_jp.csv (1,069 TSE names) grepped first; all 12 picks confirmed present with sector labels: Suzuki 7269, DENSO 6902, Mitsubishi Electric 6503, Panasonic HD 6752, Tokyo Electron 8035, Asahi Kasei 3407, Ajinomoto 2802, Eisai 4523, Terumo 4543, Nippon Steel 5401, Mitsui O.S.K. 9104, ASICS 7936. Mitsubishi Heavy, Kawasaki Heavy, IHI, Daikin, Hitachi, Yaskawa, Suntory, Fujitsu General are NOT in the CSV (Aerospace & Defence bucket contains only 5 small space startups; 'Shipbuilding & Marine' is mostly shipping/logistics lines), so shipping major MOL represents that sector and Mitsubishi Electric/Panasonic represent white goods/electricals.

Primary sources actually parsed as full PDFs (pdftotext, grep 'India'): Suzuki Integrated Report 2025, MOL REPORT 2025, Mitsubishi Electric Integrated Report 2025 + Jan-2023 India plant release, Terumo Report 2024, Asahi Kasei Report 2025, ASICS Integrated Report 2024, Ajinomoto FY2024 results + ASV chapter PDF. Nippon Steel, TEL, Eisai evidence from verified official news releases (WebFetch).

Profitability: taken from the parsed reports where available (Suzuki, Terumo, Asahi Kasei, ASICS, Ajinomoto), otherwise stockanalysis.com TYO quote pages (FY ended Mar-2026 figures for DENSO, TEL, Eisai, Nippon Steel, MELCO, Panasonic, MOL). All 12 are profitable; Nippon Steel's FY-Mar-2026 net income is depressed ~95% by U.S. Steel acquisition-related one-offs.

Levels: HIGH = named India capex/plant/strategic-priority commitments in company's own report or releases; MEDIUM = clear growth-driver framing or growing subsidiary without disclosed report-level capex; LOW = essentially no India strategy content in the report (Asahi Kasei).

Quotes marked 'verified' were extracted verbatim from fetched documents; anything sourced only from secondary press summaries is explicitly flagged UNVERIFIED (Denso report wording, Ajinomoto ASV distribution-strategy wording, Terumo Penpol new-plant amount).
site_access_issues: denso.com blocked all fetches (403 via WebFetch and curl with Mozilla UA, both HTML pages and PDFs) — Denso Integrated Report 2025 could not be quoted directly
terumo.com online report 2025 returned HTTP 402 (Cloudflare); direct PDF of Terumo Report 2024 downloaded fine via curl
holdings.panasonic IR library blocked to curl (445-byte stub) — Panasonic integrated report not directly quoted
asahi-kasei.com served the report PDF gzip-encoded without headers; required manual gunzip before pdftotext
globalsuzuki.com integrated-report path guess 404'd; correct PDF found via /ir/library/annualreport/ index scrape
aftermarketnews.com 403'd on fetch (Denso report summary used from search-result snippet only)
